description_long: A pair of donuts with a glossy pink icing are placed on a white ceramic plate, accompanied by a white mug, all set atop a dark wooden shelf. The donuts are round, with a smooth, shiny glaze that reflects light, and are free of any visible toppings. The plate and mug are both simple in design, with the mug featuring a curved handle. The shelf is supported by a vertical red panel at the back, which also serves as a backdrop, giving the scene a cozy, café-like appearance. The overall arrangement suggests a casual snack or coffee break setting, with the donuts and mug neatly organized on the shelf. The scene is clean and uncluttered, emphasizing the inviting appearance of the donuts.
description: Two pink-glazed donuts rest on a white plate beside a white mug, all arranged on a dark wooden shelf with a red backdrop.
description_view_0: Side view showing the white mug and plate with two pink donuts on a dark shelf, with the red panel visible behind.
description_view_1: Frontal view highlighting the donuts, plate, and mug centered on the shelf, framed by the red backdrop.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, with the mug and donuts on the plate visible from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view showing only the solid red panel, with no donuts or other objects visible.
attribute_icing_type: pink frosted glaze, smooth and glossy
attribute_placement_location: on a white plate atop a dark wooden shelf with a red vertical backdrop
